questions.question: How many paid leaves are full-time employees entitled to per year?
questions.answer: Full-time employees are entitled to 24 paid leaves per calendar year.
questions.ground_truth: Full-time employees are entitled to 24 paid leaves per calendar year, credited at 2 leaves per month. They may carry forward a maximum of 10 unused leaves to the next year.
contexts:
BrightWave Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
Employee Handbook
1. Company Overview
BrightWave Technologies is a software company founded in 2018, headquartered in Bengaluru, India.
The company builds AI-powered products for customer support automation. BrightWave currently has
240 employees across three offices: Bengaluru, Pune, and a remote engineering team distributed
across India.
2. Leave Policy
All full-time employees are entitled to 24 paid leaves per calendar year, credited at 2 leaves per month.
Employees may carry forward a maximum of 10 unused leaves to the next year. Sick leave is capped
at 8 days per year and does not require prior approval, but a doctor's note is needed for absences
longer than 3 consecutive days.
3. Maternity and Paternity Leave
Female employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave as per the Maternity Benefit Act.
Male employees are entitled to 15 days of paid paternity leave, which must be availed within 6 months
of the child's birth.

Male employees are entitled to 15 days of paid paternity leave, which must be availed within 6 months
of the child's birth.
4. Salary and Compensation
Salaries are disbursed on the last working day of every month via direct bank transfer. Annual
performance reviews are conducted every April, and salary revisions, if applicable, are effective from
May 1st. Employees are eligible for an annual bonus of up to 10% of their base salary, subject to
individual and company performance.
5. Work From Home Policy
Employees may work from home up to 2 days per week without prior approval. Fully remote
arrangements require manager and HR approval. All remote employees must be available on Slack
and video calls between 10 AM and 5 PM IST.
6. Probation Period
New employees undergo a probation period of 3 months from their date of joining. During probation,
either party may terminate employment with 15 days' notice. Upon successful completion of probation,

7. Resignation and Notice Period
Employees who wish to resign must submit a written resignation to their manager and HR. The
standard notice period is 60 days for confirmed employees and 15 days for employees on probation.
Unused leaves at the time of resignation will be encashed along with the final settlement.
8. Code of Conduct
Employees are expected to maintain professionalism, respect colleagues, and protect confidential
company information. Any violation of the code of conduct, including harassment or data misuse, may
result in disciplinary action up to and including termination.
9. IT and Equipment Policy
Every employee is issued a laptop and necessary software licenses upon joining. Employees must
return all company equipment within 5 days of their last working day. Loss or damage to company
equipment due to negligence may be charged to the employee.
10. Contact Information
For any HR-related queries, employees can reach out to hr@brightwavetech.com or contact the HR
questions.reference_context: All full-time employees are entitled to 24 paid leaves per calendar year, credited at 2 leaves per month. Employees may carry forward a maximum of 10 unused leaves to the next year.

questions.question: How many days of paid maternity leave are female employees entitled to?
questions.answer: Female employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave. Since there are 7 days in a week, this is equivalent to 26 x 7 = 182 days of paid maternity leave.
questions.ground_truth: Female employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave, as per the Maternity Benefit Act.
